items.title: Associate Software Developer
items.description: Architected and maintained reusable React and Craft CMS boilerplates with a streamlined Git workflow. Engineered high-performance Next.js applications with optimized SSR/CSR, developed mobile-first UIs with SCSS and Bootstrap, integrated Craft CMS with custom API endpoints, and led end-to-end delivery from requirements to deployment.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Built interactive React components and optimized multipage architecture for performance and server efficiency. Created structured responsive pages using HTML/SCSS and Bootstrap, enhanced UX with JavaScript libraries including Barba.js and Three.js, integrated PIMCORE CMS endpoints, and managed Salesforce customer journey workflows and data extensions.

items.title: Jr. Frontend Developer (Internship)
items.description: Implemented a client shop system, developed a React SPA to improve loading performance, integrated Firebase-backed dynamic data instead of static datasets, and implemented RESTful client-server communication.

items.title: Masters in Applied Computer Science
items.description: Focused on advanced databases, software architecture, cybersecurity, and UX engineering with practical projects in Angular, Vue, and React.

items.title: Bachelor of Computer Application
items.description: Studied Linux OS, data structures, software testing, computer networks, SQL/PLSQL, Java, C++, and web development fundamentals.
